name: session-gate
description: Thin cross-client session-boundary wrapper for KB-lifecycle and CASE Companion. Detects which canonical surfaces apply and routes startup and closeout without duplicating durable memory or CASE canon.

interface.shortDescription: Thin session wrapper for KB + CASE
interface.longDescription: Install a thin session-boundary wrapper that detects whether KB-lifecycle, KB/Wiki vNext, CASE Companion, or a combination is present, then routes startup and closeout to the canonical surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use the Session Gate skill to start this session safely in a KB-based project.
Use the Session Gate skill to close this session without drifting from KB-lifecycle or vNext.
